title: Loyalty Earning Rule DSL
description: Canonical decision-table form of an Earning Rule's dsl_json. Constrained and non-Turing-complete: a flat field->condition predicate per row (implicit AND), a fixed vocabulary of comparison operators, two earn formula types, and a closed set of caps. Validated at save by loyalty-earning's Rule Engine.

inputs.description: Declarative list of event-payload fields the rows reference (drives the decision-table UI). Informational.

hitPolicy.description: FIRST: the first matching row wins and evaluation stops. COLLECT: every matching row's earn is summed.

tierMultiplier.description: If true, the row's computed points are multiplied by the member's current tier benefits.multiplier before rounding and perEventMax.

rounding.description: Applied to the per-row points after rate and tier-multiplier math.

predicate.description: Field -> condition map. Multiple fields are ANDed. Use a row whose only condition is "*" as the catch-all / else branch.

perAmount.description: RATE only: denominator in the same units as the event amount field (e.g. 1 = per 1 currency unit).

points.description: RATE: points awarded per perAmount unit. FIXED: flat points awarded when the row matches.

balances.description: Which balance(s) receive the delta. Defaults to both.

caps.description: Closed set of caps. perEventMax is stateless; the per-member caps are accumulated in cap_counter (programId, ruleId, memberId, window_key).

perEventMax.description: Max points this rule may award from a single event.

perMemberPerDay.description: Max points this RULE may award one member per calendar day. Per-rule only; the Program-level Source-Aggregate cap (across a source's rules) is enforced outside the DSL.

perMemberPerMonth.description: Max points this rule may award one member per calendar month.

perMemberPerRule.description: Lifetime cap per member for this rule. 1 models a one-time award (welcome bonus); null = unlimited.
